title: Luna Craft
description: A minecraft modpack that focuses on create trains and automation
body:
# Luna Craft
Welcome to our first modpack!
This pack is for people who like to build with the create trains while adding some quallity of life mods to help you on your adventure. This includes some tech mods (some advanced and some more basic). And also some magic mods.

The end goal of the pack is to reach outer space or just to build your train empire.

## **Warning currently in beta**
Bugs and crashes are to be expected

## Modlist
A small list of mods
- Create
- Steam and rails (advanced trains)
- Railway navigator (train app and displays)
- Applied Energistics 2 (Advanced storage and autocrafting)
- Sophisticated Storage (For storage)
- Sophisticated Backpacks (For backpacks)
- Mekanism (Extra automation and power)
- Computercrat (for automation and silly scripts)
- Biomancy (for the magic lovers)
- Ocultism (Demon rituals and more)
- Ars nouveau (Magic mod with custom spells)
- Terralith (Biomes and terrain)
- Alex's mobs (Cute animals
- Ad astra (Build rockets to go to space)
